items.detail: Biologist confirms the seeded findings are scientifically credible
Dataset catalog parse/upsert round-trip against a real captured MOSAIC Window page
items.summary: 4 passed: overview parses despite inconsistent blank-line spacing, available-tables list, column grid parse with partial-group drop, and scoped upsert round-trip.

items.detail: Approved interaction knowledge, aliases, typed conditions, derived FTS5 row, and model-versioned dense vector round-trip across migration and normal re-ingest
items.summary: 8 storage tests passed; aliases and typed conditions round-trip, FTS5 and model-versioned dense vectors stay synchronized, legacy stores gain retrieval tables without rebuild, and provenance/re-ingest drift guarantees remain intact.

items.detail: Canonical people, graded hashed session identity evidence, role-labelled contributions, and confirmed source-quoted investigation edges backfill idempotently
items.summary: 8 identity and expertise tests passed. The tracked database contains 6 hashed identity-evidence rows: 2 accepted direct researcher records and 4 proposed artifact-author candidates; proposed evidence does not rewrite session ownership or create investigations, and foreign_key_check reports zero violations.
